caption: A man with glasses and a large, silver-grey textured wig sits in a room, wearing a white collared shirt, a small bow tie, and beige suspenders. He wears black headphones over his wig. Behind him, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands near a wall with a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". A framed logo featuring a shield is visible on the wall to the right. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of the man. On-screen graphics include a logo that says "#BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101". Across the frames, the man remains seated and speaks, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions. The camera remains static, and the other elements of the scene, including the woman in the background and the equipment, remain largely stationary.
